name: Tessa | Captured Bandit
description:
[Despite the thumbnail, AnyPOV]

Tessa is an experienced bandit, stealing from whoever she can to get by, until she was caught by you while trying to nab your supplies. Be a good Samaritan and let her go, kill her, turn her in for a bounty, or... have her "repay" you...

You're already in a position of power over her, so very possibly a bad person POV, but it depends what you do to her. I hope you enjoy!
creator: TravAme
